name: Eastern Check Cashing
description_short: Eastern Check Cashing offers check cashing and money transfer services at their Las Vegas location on N Eastern Ave, with extended daily hours and Western Union partnership.
description_long:
Eastern Check Cashing operates as a financial services outlet located at 1560 N Eastern Ave, Suite W2 in Las Vegas, Nevada. The business is positioned within the check-cashing and money services category, providing essential financial transaction services to the Las Vegas community. Based on available information, the company maintains a physical retail location that serves customers seeking quick access to check cashing and related financial services.

The company offers check cashing services as its primary offering, with integration into the Western Union network for money transfer capabilities. Their service portfolio includes the ability to process checks for immediate cash access and facilitate wire transfers and money orders through the Western Union partnership. The business operates extended hours throughout the week, maintaining consistent availability from 10:00 AM to 6:45 PM daily to accommodate working customers and those with varied schedules.

Eastern Check Cashing distinguishes itself through its partnership with Western Union, a globally recognized money transfer provider, which expands service offerings beyond basic check cashing. The extended daily operating hours (7 days per week from 10:00 AM to 6:45 PM) provide accessibility that may exceed typical banking hours. The location on N Eastern Ave positions the business in an accessible Las Vegas neighborhood area with straightforward navigation and parking availability.

Potential customers should note that the available information is limited to basic operational details and directory listings. No specific fee structures, processing times, identification requirements, or customer reviews are available from the provided sources. The company appears to be a straightforward check-cashing service rather than a comprehensive financial services provider, making it suitable primarily for customers with immediate check-cashing needs rather than those seeking broader financial solutions.

pros: Extended operating hours: Open 10:00 AM - 6:45 PM every day of the week, including weekends
Western Union integration: Access to wire transfers and money orders through established Western Union network
Consistent daily availability: Same hours maintained across all days (Sunday through Saturday) for predictable access
Physical storefront location: Established brick-and-mortar presence at 1560 N Eastern Ave with navigable address
Direct phone contact: Available at (702) 399-7497 for customer inquiries and service questions
cons: Limited service transparency: No publicly available fee schedules, processing times, or service terms on provided materials
No online presence beyond directory listings: Company lacks dedicated website with service details and pricing information
Minimal customer information: No reviews, ratings, or customer feedback available from provided sources
Unclear fee structure: No information available regarding check cashing fees, Western Union transaction costs, or other service charges
Basic service scope: Appears to focus solely on check cashing and wire transfers without broader financial services
best_for: Las Vegas residents needing immediate check cashing outside standard banking hours
Customers requiring weekend check cashing access in the N Eastern Ave area
Individuals needing Western Union money transfer services at a physical retail location
diagnosis: Eastern Check Cashing is best for Las Vegas residents and visitors who need quick check cashing access during extended hours, particularly outside traditional banking windows. The primary caveat is that publicly available information is extremely limited—there are no disclosed fee structures, processing details, or customer reviews, so customers should call (702) 399-7497 directly to confirm current services, rates, and requirements before visiting.
